systems.system_notes: Platform shoulder arthroplasty system supporting anatomic shoulder reconstruction for primary total shoulder replacement.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials support dedicated Comprehensive shoulder instrumentation and linked technique resources.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe the humeral stem platform used for anatomic shoulder reconstruction.
Official materials describe the anatomic glenoid component family within the platform.
Official materials describe humeral head options for anatomic shoulder arthroplasty.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Comprehensive shoulder page defines the anatomic implant construct but does not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
